slides.title: Advancing Pharmaceutical Traceability with GS1
slides.description: Empowering pharmaceutical and healthcare sectors with global barcode, QR, and DataMatrix standards to ensure product safety, regulatory compliance, and full traceability.

slides.title: Enhancing Logistics & Supply Chain Visibility with GS1
slides.description: Empowering logistics providers with global barcode, QR, and ID standards to enable real-time tracking, accurate product identification, and seamless data sharing.

slides.title: Connect with Confidence
slides.description: Join a network of over 2 million companies worldwide using GS1 standards to do business with confidence.

solutions.title: Powering Every Industry with Global Standards
solutions.description: From healthcare to e-commerce, GS1 Saudi Arabia delivers scalable identification, traceability, and data standards that drive efficiency, compliance, and consumer trust.

technology.title: Next-Generation Barcode Solutions for Saudi Arabia
technology.description: From 2D barcodes and GS1 Digital Link to ZATCA compliance and end-to-end traceability -- one unified platform powering the Kingdom's digital transformation.

2d-barcodes.label: 2D Barcodes
2d-barcodes.headline: The Future of Barcodes Is Here
2d-barcodes.description: 2D barcodes pack exponentially more data into a single scan. From DataMatrix to QR codes powered by GS1 standards, Saudi businesses gain richer product information, consumer engagement, and supply chain intelligence -- all from one symbol.

features.title: 100x More Data
features.text: Encode product details, batch numbers, expiry dates, and URLs in a single 2D symbol.

features.title: Smartphone-Ready
features.text: Consumers scan with any smartphone camera -- no special apps or hardware needed.

features.title: Sunrise 2027 Ready
features.text: Prepare your business for the global GS1 migration from 1D to 2D barcodes by 2027.

digital-link.label: GS1 Digital Link
digital-link.headline: One Code. Infinite Connections.
digital-link.description: GS1 Digital Link transforms every barcode into a gateway to digital content. A single scan connects consumers, retailers, and regulators to product pages, authenticity checks, sustainability data, and more -- all through a standard web URI.

features.title: Web-Native Barcodes
features.text: Every product gets a unique URL that resolves to the right content for each audience.

features.title: Multi-Purpose Scans
features.text: Same code serves consumers, point-of-sale, warehouse, and regulatory systems.

features.title: Anti-Counterfeit
features.text: Verify product authenticity instantly with GS1-powered digital verification.

zatca.label: ZATCA & Compliance
zatca.headline: Seamless ZATCA E-Invoicing Compliance
zatca.description: Saudi Arabia's ZATCA e-invoicing mandate requires GS1-compliant QR codes on every tax invoice. GS1 Saudi Arabia provides the standards, tools, and support to ensure your business meets Phase 2 integration requirements with confidence.

features.title: Phase 2 Ready
features.text: Full compliance with ZATCA FATOORA integration requirements using GS1 standards.

features.title: Validated QR Codes
features.text: Generate compliant QR codes with seller info, VAT number, invoice totals, and timestamps.

features.title: Vision 2030 Aligned
features.text: Support Saudi Arabia's digital transformation goals with standards-based e-commerce.

traceability.label: End-to-End Traceability
traceability.headline: Track Every Product. Every Step.
traceability.description: EPCIS 2.0 and GS1 standards deliver full supply chain visibility from raw materials to the end consumer. Saudi businesses gain real-time tracking, recall readiness, and the transparency that regulators and consumers demand.

features.title: EPCIS 2.0
features.text: Capture what, where, when, and why events across your entire supply chain.

features.title: Instant Recall
features.text: Pinpoint affected batches in minutes, not weeks -- protecting consumers and your brand.

features.title: Cross-Border Ready
features.text: Interoperable standards that work with global trading partners and regulatory systems.
